title: taste the weather
summary: it tastes the live sky, checks the hash before it trusts a single  line, then runs it right there in your browser.

title: sealed storefront
summary: a small menu welded to a seal and a chain of custody — a storefront that remembers where every part came from.

title: universal hologram player
summary: one gentle player renders any content-addressed creature in the browser, with no code written for any single one.
